summary: Refactored DuckBrowserManager to eliminate all hardcode. FingerprintTemplate now used as single source of truth: GenerateUserAgentFromTemplate() picks random OS model from template and replaces {VERSION} placeholder. TLS cipher lists read from TlsFingerprintTemplate.TLS section in each OS block of default_fingerprint.json (Windows/macOS/Linux/Android/iOS each have their own CipherList and CurvesList). PlatformToOsKey() maps Platform string to OS key for template lookup. GetTlsFromTemplate() resolves TLS config by scanning OS blocks for matching tls.Os field. GetCachedTemplateSync() added to FingerprintService for synchronous template loading from embedded resource. DuckBrowserManager no-arg constructor now calls GetCachedTemplateSync() to auto-populate template. All hardcoded UA strings, TLS cipher lists, and CpuBrand fallback removed from DuckBrowserManager.
current_status: DuckBrowserManager uses FingerprintTemplate from embedded resource as the single source of truth. No hardcode in code paths. default_fingerprint.json updated with TLS sections for all 5 OS families. TlsFingerprintTemplate model added. FingerprintService.GetCachedTemplateSync() provides synchronous template access. Linter clean.
